findings.search_query: Zimri Fuller 1814 Albion Maine Freedom Waldo Susan Danforth Find a Grave; Maine historical and genealogical recorder
findings.source_title: The Maine Historical and Genealogical Recorder, vol. 13 (Freedom, ME deaths)
findings.snippet: Susan (Danforth), wife of Zimri Fuller, age 29 years 7 months, daughter of Josiah & Huldah [Kelley] Danforth. Also Sarah (Danforth) Fuller, wife of Zimri Fuller, died 15 June 1863 aged 32.
findings.claimed_facts: Zimri Fuller of Freedom, Waldo Co., ME married (1) Susan Danforth (d. 1845, age 29y7m, dau. of Josiah & Huldah Kelley Danforth) and (2) her sister Sarah Danforth (d. 15 Jun 1863, age 32). Confirms spouse and her parents per worklist.
findings.notes: Published genealogical record (death abstracts). Confirms Zimri Fuller married two Danforth sisters, both daughters of Josiah & Huldah (Kelley) Danforth. Does not directly give Zimri's own birth (1814) or death (1885) dates — those still need a vital/grave source. Albion was historically called Fairfax, consistent with worklist birthplace.

findings.search_query: Frederic J Bagley obituary (mentions grandparents Ethel Pierce line); John Edward Pierce Troy Maine 1855
findings.source_title: Frederic J. Bagley obituary, Bangor Daily News
findings.snippet: He was the son of Fred H. and Ethel (Pierce) Bagley ... born August 21, 1911, in Troy.
findings.claimed_facts: Indirect confirmation of the Pierce line at Troy, ME: Ethel (Pierce) Bagley, daughter of John Edward Pierce & Emma Fairfield per worklist, was mother of Frederic Bagley (b. 1911 Troy). Supports the Pierce family's presence in Troy, Waldo Co.
findings.notes: Indirect/circumstantial — confirms the Pierce surname in Troy and the Ethel Pierce -> Bagley link, but no direct record of John Edward Pierce's own 1855 birth or 1930 death was located on free sources. Direct grave/vital record still needed.

findings.search_query: Susan Danforth Fuller Freedom Maine 1816 1845 Josiah Danforth Huldah Kelley; WikiTree Danforth-93
findings.snippet: Children of Josiah Danforth and Huldah (Kelley) Danforth include: Susan Danforth (b. December 16, 1816 in Freedom, Waldo, Maine) ... Sarah (Danforth) Fuller (b. 1831).
findings.claimed_facts: Susan Danforth b. 16 Dec 1816 Freedom, Waldo, Maine; daughter of Josiah Danforth (1789-1858) and Huldah Kelley (b. 2 Aug 1791 Yarmouth MA, m. 24 Dec 1809 Vassalboro). Matches worklist birth date and parents exactly. Sister Sarah Danforth Fuller also listed (the second wife of Zimri Fuller).
findings.notes: WikiTree profile (web tree) but cross-corroborated by the published Maine Historical & Genealogical Recorder death abstract (Susan d. 1845 age 29y7m, dau. of Josiah & Huldah Danforth). Birth date 16 Dec 1816 and parents match worklist exactly.

findings.search_query: James Soper 1790 Yorkshire England Dixmont Penobscot Maine Mary Ann Reed; Sopers migrating to USA rootsweb; WikiTree Soper index
findings.source_title: Sopers Migrating to USA (Soperstuff genealogy) / 1850 US Census Dixmont
findings.snippet: James Soper b. 19 Jan 1790, m. Mary Reed (b. 21 Nov 1794); children b. Dixmont, Penobscot, Maine incl. Ann R, George J (1827), Jabez E (1829), Charles (1830), James C (1831), Mary S (1834). 1850 census Dixmont: James 60, farmer, $1,200 real estate; wife Mary 55; children listed as born in England; immigrated 1833.
findings.claimed_facts: James Soper b. 19 Jan 1790 (matches worklist), wife Mary Reed; family settled Dixmont, Penobscot Co., ME after immigrating from England ~1833. Daughter Ann R(eed) Soper ties to the worklist's Pierce line (Ann Reed Soper was mother of Rufus Pierce's wife). Death/burial in Dixmont area.
findings.notes: Birth date 19 Jan 1790 matches worklist. CONFLICT: a WikiTree Soper index entry shows a James Soper 27 May 1790 Orland, Hancock, ME - 13 Mar 1870, which differs in birth date/place and death date from worklist (6 Aug 1870 Dixmont). The Dixmont/Mary Reed/England-immigrant identity from rootsweb is the better match. Birthplace given as Middlesbrough/Yorkshire in worklist is plausible but unconfirmed by these sources.

findings.search_query: Daniel Smith 1779 Maine Hollis York Lucy Cookson 1860 Find a Grave; Cookson Family rootsweb
findings.source_title: Cookson Family genealogy (rootsweb) / Daniel P Smith Find a Grave
findings.snippet: Lucy Cookson b. 1783, d. 21 Apr 1861 Hollis, Maine, married Daniel Smith on 27 Nov 1800 in Hollis, Maine. Daniel Smith d. 12 July 1860.
findings.claimed_facts: Daniel Smith married Lucy Cookson 27 Nov 1800 in Hollis, York Co., ME; Daniel d. 12 Jul 1860 (matches worklist death date exactly); Lucy d. 21 Apr 1861. Confirms spouse (Lucy Cookson), death date, and Hollis, Maine location per worklist.
findings.notes: Death date 12 Jul 1860 and spouse Lucy Cookson match worklist. CONFLICT: a Find a Grave memorial (findagrave.com/memorial/66133299) for a 'Daniel P Smith' shows dates 1779-1850, which conflicts with the 1860 death — likely a different/duplicate or transcription issue; needs human review. Lucy's birth here (1783) vs Daniel's b.1779 consistent.

findings.search_query: Josiah Danforth 1789 Frankfort Maine Huldah Kelley Freedom 1858; WikiTree Danforth-93
findings.snippet: Birth: February 6, 1789 in Frankfort, Waldo County, Maine. Death: October 28, 1858 at age 69 in Freedom, Waldo County, Maine. Parents: Phillip Danforth and Mary (Tibbetts) Danforth. Married Huldah Kelley on 24 December 1809 in Vassalboro, Kennebec County, Maine. Buried Kelley/Danforth Family Cemetery, Hardwood Lane, Freedom.
findings.claimed_facts: Josiah Danforth b. 6 Feb 1789 Frankfort, Waldo, ME; d. 28 Oct 1858 Freedom, Waldo, ME; parents Phillip Danforth & Mary Tibbetts; m. Huldah Kelley 24 Dec 1809 Vassalboro. ALL match worklist (birth, death, parents, spouse). Buried Kelly-Danforth Cemetery, Freedom.
findings.notes: WikiTree profile; every fact (birth 6 Feb 1789, death 28 Oct 1858, parents Phillip Danforth & Mary Tibbets, spouse Huldah Kelley) matches the worklist exactly. There is a real Kelly-Danforth Cemetery in Freedom (Find a Grave cemetery #89796) supporting the burial claim.

findings.search_query: Phebe Washburn 1788 Wayne Kennebec Maine Samuel Adams Hosea Washburn New Sharon Find a Grave; Doty Family in America
findings.source_title: Phebe Washburn b. 16 Sep 1787 Wayne, ME | Doty Family in America (edwarddoty.org)
findings.snippet: Phebe Washburn b. 16 Sep 1787 Wayne, ME; d. 1874 New Sharon, ME. Daughter of Hosea Washburn and Hannah Doty.
findings.claimed_facts: Phebe Washburn b. 16 Sep 1787 Wayne, Kennebec Co., ME; d. 1874 New Sharon, Franklin Co., ME; daughter of Hosea Washburn & Hannah Doty. Death year and places and parents match worklist; birth year off by one (1787 vs worklist 1788).
findings.notes: Doty Family in America (a sourced one-name genealogy site). Death (1874 New Sharon) and parents (Hosea Washburn, Hannah Doty) match worklist. CONFLICT: birth 16 Sep 1787 here vs 16 Sep 1788 in worklist (same day/month, one year off). Spouse Samuel Adams not confirmed in this snippet.

findings.search_query: Stephen Bragg 1783 Vassalboro Kennebec Maine Albion Hannah Wing 1863 Find a Grave; Geni
findings.snippet: Stephen Bragg born May 12, 1783 in Vassalboro, Kennebec, Maine; died December 21, 1863 in Albion, Kennebec, Maine. Wife: Hannah Bragg (born Wing). Children include Preston, Harriet, Alvin, and Stephen Jr. Bragg.
findings.claimed_facts: Stephen Bragg b. 12 May 1783 Vassalboro, Kennebec, ME; d. 21 Dec 1863 Albion, Kennebec, ME; m. Hannah Wing. Birth date/place, death date/place and spouse all match worklist exactly.
findings.notes: Geni web tree; all key facts (b. 12 May 1783 Vassalboro, d. 21 Dec 1863 Albion, wife Hannah Wing) match worklist exactly. Parents (Matthew Bragg & Patience Bishop) not shown in snippet. A 'Bragg Booklet' (rootsweb) exists as a possible corroborating source for human review.

findings.search_query: Clyde Fernald 1907 Troy Maine Albion 1992 Marion Bragg Medwin Fernald obituary
findings.source_title: Kay Tozier obituary (daughter of Clyde & Marion Fernald), Bangor Daily News / Midcoast Villager
findings.snippet: Kay Frances Fernald Tozier ... daughter of Clyde and Marion (Bragg) Fernald ... lived in Troy, Maine with her grandparents Medwin and Dora Fernald.
findings.claimed_facts: Confirms Clyde Fernald married Marion Bragg; his parents were Medwin (Medwin Joseph) and Dora (Eldora 'Dora' Meservie) Fernald of Troy, Maine. Matches worklist spouse and parents.
findings.notes: Confirmation comes via his daughter's obituary, which names Clyde & Marion (Bragg) Fernald and grandparents Medwin & Dora Fernald of Troy — all consistent with worklist. Clyde's own 1907 birth / 1992 death not directly in this source; a direct grave/obituary still needed.

findings.search_query: Frederic J Bagley 1911 Troy Maine 2006 Grace Lenentine obituary Find a Grave
findings.source_title: Frederic J. Bagley obituary, Bangor Daily News
findings.snippet: Frederic J. Bagley, 95, died December 12, 2006, at his home in Hampden. Born August 21, 1911, in Troy, son of Fred H. and Ethel (Pierce) Bagley. Graduated Unity High School 1929. In 1942 married Grace Lenentine; reared four children (Judith Grace Mabee, Stan, Rick, Keith). Troy selectman and fire chief.
findings.claimed_facts: Frederic J. Bagley b. 21 Aug 1911 Troy, Waldo, ME; d. 12 Dec 2006 (at home in Hampden); parents Fred H. Bagley & Ethel Pierce; m. Grace Lenentine 1942; children incl. Judith Grace (Mabee). All match worklist (birth date/place, parents, spouse, daughter Judith).
findings.notes: Published newspaper obituary — strong record. Birth 21 Aug 1911 Troy, parents Fred H. & Ethel (Pierce) Bagley, wife Grace Lenentine all match worklist. NOTE: death place given as Hampden (where he resided after 2002), while worklist says Troy; the family farm was in Troy. Daughter Judith Grace Mabee = worklist's Judith E Bagley (m. Fernald per worklist? confirm).

findings.search_query: Grace Lenentine Bagley 1920/1921 Maine 2017 Frederic Bagley obituary
findings.source_title: Grace Bagley obituary (1920-2017), Brookings-Smith Funeral Home / Bangor Daily News
findings.snippet: Grace Bagley born May 12, 1920, in Monticello; died January 14, 2017 (age 96). Parents Guy Lester Lenentine and Marguerite (Danforth) Lenentine. Married Frederick J. Bagley in 1942 (he died 2006). Children: Judith Grace (Mabee), Stan, Rick, Keith. Attended Ricker Classical Institute and Husson Business School.
findings.claimed_facts: Grace Lenentine b. 12 May 1920 Monticello, ME; d. 14 Jan 2017; parents Guy L. Lenentine & Marguerite (Danforth) Lenentine; m. Frederic J. Bagley 1942. Death date matches worklist (14 Jan 2017); spouse and father (Guy L. Lenentine) match.
findings.notes: Published obituary. Death 14 Jan 2017 and spouse/father match worklist exactly. CONFLICTS to flag: (1) born 12 May 1920 in Monticello, ME vs worklist 'abt 1921, Maine' (close, one year off); (2) mother given as Marguerite (Danforth) Lenentine — worklist lists mother as 'Marguerite Lenentine' (maiden Danforth consistent with worklist person Marguerite Lenentine whose parents incl. Otis Danforth).

findings.search_query: Marion Bragg Fernald 1909 Albion Maine 1979 Clyde Fernald Oscar Bragg Find a Grave
findings.source_title: Kay Tozier obituary (daughter of Clyde & Marion (Bragg) Fernald), Bangor Daily News
findings.snippet: Kay Frances Fernald Tozier ... daughter of Clyde and Marion (Bragg) Fernald.
findings.claimed_facts: Confirms Marion Bragg married Clyde Fernald (worklist spouse) and they were parents in Troy/Albion, Maine. Consistent with worklist parents Oscar Blaine Bragg & Katherine Fuller.
findings.notes: Indirect — via daughter's obituary naming 'Marion (Bragg) Fernald.' Confirms the Bragg->Fernald marriage only. Marion's own birth (1909 Albion) and death (1979) not directly sourced on free sites; direct grave/obituary needed.
